news.t: Global airlines hike fares, cut routes as fuel costs balloon
BMO Launches +/- 3X MAX™ Airlines Exchange Traded Notes on NYSE Arca

holdings.infoBox: JETD is an equity ETF with a total of 21 individual holdings. The top holdings are United Airlines Holdings stock at 9.91%, American Airlines Group at 9.69%, GE Aerospace at 9.49%, Delta Air Lines at 9.42%, and RTX Corporation at 8.58%.

overview.description: The MAX Airlines - 3X Inverse Leveraged ETNs (JETD) is an exchange-traded note that is based on the Prime Airlines index. The fund tracks -3x the daily price movements of an index consisting of US-listed companies in the air transportation industry, these include airlines, airfreight and logistics, and aircraft and parts manufacturing. The index selects equities by market cap and weights the resulting portfolio by liquidity. JETD was launched on Jun 23, 2023 and is issued by Max.
